title: SmallMultiAdventure
description:
small survival and creative modpack which serves to improve Minecraft by adding, for example, new biomes, a new weather and survival system

download it to be able to play with your friends online or alone
body:
Small Modpack is a survival modpack that improves Minecraft and tries to be semi-compact, without demanding too many resources from the computer.

Thanks to this modpack, you will be able to better locate yourself and map areas using the Journey Map mod.
Complicated crafts will no longer be complicated because now the Just Enough Items mod allows you to find them in a few seconds. You will find that Minecraft lacks exploration, now Ad Astra and Biome O' Plenty mods will allow you to discover new biomes, structures and planets. Serene Seasons and Weather mods,
Storms & Tornadoes will add a more immersive weather system.you can also speak with your thanks to the plasmo voice mod

A new survival system is added thanks to the Survive mod, and the lack of space in the inventory is solved because Traveler's Backpack adds backpacks. The End is improved thanks to the End Remastered mod.

If you find single player to be good but boring,
Thanks to Essencial, you can invite all your friends to join your Minecraft games.

The main mods are:

Ad Astra / Ad Astra Extra
Alex's Cave / Alex's Mobs
AppleSkin
BetterF3
O'Plenty Biome
Create
Embeddium / Embeddium++
End Remastered
Essential
Farming Delight
FerriteCore
Journey Map
Just Enough Items
Mouse Tweaks
Occulus
Serene Seasons
Starlight
Survive
Traveler's Backpack
Weather, Storms & Tornadoes
And all Yung's mods
plasmo voice
wither storm mod 
tectonic
waystones
more mob variant
ice and fire
moar achievement


The modpack will be updated regularly. 
Be careful, if the computer you are using is too old or not efficient enough for the modpack, this can cause lags or crashes. I recommend allocating at least 4 or 5 gigabytes of RAM so as not to have too much lag
this modpack aims to improve minecraft and bring a taste to games for certain people
download it for fun and discover new ways to play minecraft
